MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Scott Spencer is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Donald Propstra and Timothy Lane-Propstra are present.
Attorney Candy Smallwood representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB 23, 2015 remains on calendar.
